001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
008
009/**
010 * Represents a text element.
011 */
012public class Text extends AbstractElement<Text> {
013    private Component text;
014    private Boolean shadow;
015
016    /**
017     * Create a new text element.
018     *
019     * @param key Unique identifier
020     */
021    public Text(@NotNull String key) {
022        this(Key.of(key));
023    }
024
025    /**
026     * Create a new text element.
027     *
028     * @param key Unique identifier
029     */
030    public Text(@NotNull Key key) {
031        super(key, Type.TEXT);
032    }
033
034    /**
035     * Create a new text element.
036     *
037     * @param key Unique identifier
038     * @return New text element
039     */
040    @NotNull
041    public static Text of(@NotNull String key) {
042        return of(Key.of(key));
043    }
044
045    /**
046     * Create a new text element.
047     *
048     * @param key Unique identifier
049     * @return New text element
050     */
051    @NotNull
052    public static Text of(@NotNull Key key) {
053        return new Text(key);
054    }
055
056    /**
057     * Get the text component.
058     *
059     * @return Text component
060     */
061    @Nullable
062    public Component getText() {
063        return this.text;
064    }
065
066    /**
067     * Set the text component.
068     *
069     * @param text Component to set
070     * @return This text
071     */
072    @NotNull
073    public Text setText(@Nullable Component text) {
074        this.text = text;
075        return this;
076    }
077
078    /**
079     * Whether to draw a drop shadow behind the text.
080     *
081     * @return {@code true} to draw a drop shadow behind the text, otherwise {@code false}
082     */
083    @Nullable
084    public Boolean hasShadow() {
085        return this.shadow;
086    }
087
088    /**
089     * Set whether to draw a drop shadow behind the text.
090     *
091     * @param shadow {@code true} if text should have shadow, otherwise {@code false}
092     * @return This text
093     */
094    @NotNull
095    public Text setShadow(@Nullable Boolean shadow) {
096        this.shadow = shadow;
097        return this;
098    }
099
100    @Override
101    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
102        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
103            return false;
104        }
105        Text other = (Text) obj;
106        return Objects.equals(getText(), other.getText())
107                && Objects.equals(hasShadow(), other.hasShadow());
108    }
109
110    @Override
111    public int hashCode() {
112        // pacifies codefactor.io
113        return super.hashCode();
114    }
115}
